intro: Build, upgrade, and expand your own money-making factory.
description:
Is a fast-paced clicker game with strategic elements where you build and expand your financial empire by optimizing money production lines. Start with a simple setup and gradually grow by upgrading equipment, unlocking new production areas, and enhancing efficiency to skyrocket your profits.

Upgrade Production Lines – Boost profit output with each upgrade.
Enhance Machines – Improve equipment to maximize efficiency.
Unlock New Sections – Expand your factory to increase production capacity.
Collect Profits – Gather money faster and trigger bonuses.

Carefully balance upgrades and expansion to create a massive financial powerhouse.
